description: Enhance your cooking skills with intermediate techniques, including sautéing, roasting, and seasoning.

skills.instruction: Learn how to sauté vegetables and proteins to enhance flavor.
Discover the art of roasting vegetables and meats for optimal taste.
Master the use of herbs and spices to elevate your dishes.

safety_notes: Always use caution when handling hot pans and ovens.
Ensure food is cooked to the appropriate temperature to avoid foodborne illness.
